value.found_quote: **`/mcp`** | Tools & Tasks | — | Open the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server manager.
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists the `/mcp` slash command in the Core slash commands table, describing it as opening the "Model Context Protocol (MCP) server manager." This directly substantiates the claim that Antigravity includes a built-in MCP server manager for integrating external context providers. The command is listed without any "preview" or "beta" qualifier, and appears alongside other standard commands, indicating it is an active/generally available feature.
